name: marketing-growth
title: Marketing & Growth Performance Console
subtitle: channel flow, campaign lift, spend mix, audience & funnel composition
description: A marketing showcase spanning ten distinct visual forms not used elsewhere in the gallery: a guided intro panel, flowing channel-traffic ribbons, a before/after campaign-lift slope, planned-vs-actual budget dots, an equal-angle spend-share wedge chart, a tier-migration step chart, a two-dimensional revenue-mix Marimekko, a packed-bubble audience view, a mirrored age/gender pyramid, and a 100%-stacked creative-format mix.

dataAccesses.name: MarketingKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(ctr_pct),1) AS ctr_pct, ROUND(AVG(conversion_rate_pct),1) AS conversion_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(cac_usd),0) AS cac_usd, ROUND(AVG(brand_awareness_score),1) AS brand_awareness_score FROM v_marketing_master

dataAccesses.name: ChannelTrafficFlow
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.month_name AS month_name, SUM(CASE WHEN t.channel='organic' THEN t.sessions END) AS organic_sessions, SUM(CASE WHEN t.channel='paid' THEN t.sessions END) AS paid_sessions, SUM(CASE WHEN t.channel='referral' THEN t.sessions END) AS referral_sessions, SUM(CASE WHEN t.channel='social' THEN t.sessions END) AS social_sessions FROM v_channel_traffic t JOIN dim_date d ON t.date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.month_number, d.month_name ORDER BY d.month_number

dataAccesses.name: CampaignCtrBeforeAfter
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT c.campaign_name AS campaign_name, c.ctr_before_pct AS ctr_before_pct, c.ctr_after_pct AS ctr_after_pct FROM v_campaign_ab_test c ORDER BY c.ctr_after_pct DESC

dataAccesses.name: ChannelBudgetPlannedActual
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ch.channel_name AS channel_name, b.budget_planned_usd AS budget_planned_usd, b.budget_actual_usd AS budget_actual_usd FROM v_channel_budget b JOIN dim_channel ch ON b.channel_id = ch.id

dataAccesses.name: AdSpendShareByChannel
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ch.channel_name AS channel_name, SUM(s.spend_amount) AS ad_spend_usd FROM v_ad_spend s JOIN dim_channel ch ON s.channel_id = ch.id GROUP BY ch.channel_name

dataAccesses.name: SubscriberTierMigration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.month_name AS month_name, SUM(CASE WHEN s.tier='free' THEN 1 END) AS free_tier_subs, SUM(CASE WHEN s.tier='pro' THEN 1 END) AS pro_tier_subs, SUM(CASE WHEN s.tier='enterprise' THEN 1 END) AS enterprise_tier_subs FROM v_subscriptions s JOIN dim_date d ON s.date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.month_number, d.month_name ORDER BY d.month_number

dataAccesses.name: RevenueMixByRegionProduct
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT r.region_name AS region_name, p.product_category AS product_category, SUM(sa.amount) AS revenue_usd FROM v_sales sa JOIN dim_region r ON sa.region_id = r.id JOIN dim_product p ON sa.product_id = p.id GROUP BY r.region_name, p.product_category

dataAccesses.name: AudienceSegmentSize
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT seg.segment_name AS segment_name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS audience_count FROM v_users u JOIN dim_segment seg ON u.segment_id = seg.id GROUP BY seg.segment_name

dataAccesses.name: AudienceAgeGenderSplit
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT age.age_band AS age_band, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN u.gender='F' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)*100,1) AS female_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN u.gender='M' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)*100,1) AS male_pct FROM v_users u JOIN dim_age_band age ON u.age_band_id = age.id GROUP BY age.age_band

dataAccesses.name: CreativeFormatMixByChannel
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ch.channel_name AS channel_name, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cr.format='video' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,1) AS video_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cr.format='image' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,1) AS image_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cr.format='carousel' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,1) AS carousel_pct, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cr.format='text' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,1) AS text_pct FROM v_creatives cr JOIN dim_channel ch ON cr.channel_id = ch.id GROUP BY ch.channel_name

kpis.label: Avg Click-Through Rate
kpis.info: Average click-through rate across all active campaigns.

kpis.label: Conversion Rate
kpis.info: Visits converting to a qualified lead or sale.

kpis.label: Customer Acquisition Cost
kpis.info: Blended cost to acquire one new customer, in USD.

opts.content:
## Marketing & Growth Performance Console
A full-funnel view of the marketing engine: **where traffic comes from**, **how campaigns lift performance**, **where budget goes**, and **who the audience is** — ten chart forms in one tour.

- Flowing ribbons for channel traffic over time
- A before/after slope for campaign lift
- Planned-vs-actual budget dots by channel
- Spend share, tier migration, revenue mix, audience size, demographic split, and creative format mix

panels.title: Channel Traffic Flow
panels.info: Monthly session volume by acquisition channel, shown as flowing stream ribbons.

panels.title: Campaign CTR: Before vs After
panels.info: Click-through rate for each campaign before and after creative optimization.

panels.title: Channel Budget: Planned vs Actual
panels.info: Planned versus actual media spend for each channel.

panels.title: Ad Spend Share by Channel
panels.info: Each channel's share of total ad spend, encoded by wedge area.

panels.title: Subscriber Tier Migration
panels.info: Subscriber counts by plan tier over time, shown as discrete steps.

panels.title: Revenue Mix by Region & Product
panels.info: Revenue composition by product category within each region — column width shows the region's share of total revenue.

panels.title: Audience Segment Size
panels.info: Relative audience size for each targeting segment, encoded by circle area.

panels.title: Audience Age & Gender Split
panels.info: Gender composition within each age band, mirrored from a shared centre axis.

panels.title: Creative Format Mix by Channel
panels.info: The proportional mix of creative formats running on each channel.
